title: rubus pectinarioides
intro: Rubus pectinarioides, also known as the "Chinese Raspberry", is a type of bramble native to China and the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of Rubus pectinarioides include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and acting as an anti-cancer agent. Rubus pectinarioides can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with the most common herbal preparations being a decoction of the roots and leaves.
